package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for repository_type_outside_repository_package: Repository implementations declared outside `repository`, `repo`, or `store` packages when the repo already uses those roles elsewhere.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule138NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule138NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule138NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario138Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule138NegativeService, input Rule138NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
